title: botrychium dissectum subsp. decompositum
intro: Botrychium dissectum subsp. decompositum, also known as the variable-leaf grape fern or decomposed grape fern, is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the grape fern plant that belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues such as arthritis and skin conditions. The health benefits of Botrychium dissectum subsp. decompositum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to its rarity and potential side effects.
